TEXT.source: NTU Corpus, Paiwan, Y2 one-minute spontaneous speech; source EAF: self-introduction_yed01 1 min.eaf; anonymized speaker label: yed01

S.FORM: a i ku e tacemekaljan izua ku kama, izua ku kina.
e izua ku kaka tjaljaljak uta.
a ku kama kata ku kina tja e a niamadju a sikacu na penawlawla aravac.
neka i takesi a aravac, i ta neka i na neka i takesi a tja i vavaw tiamadju.
a niamadju a zidai izua a ciniukuku imaza anga a.
nu uri kipaisu tiamadju a pakan tjanuamen a aicua kakedrikedrian e tjara saigu a a ciniukukuan kata pinairangan.
a ljakua a tiamadju, neka niamadju a e kinituluan, neka saigu aken nimadju niamadju a ikai ta aicu a qaqali a kai ui.
